description: Auto-approve the my-commits plugin's own read-only render script. Scoped via `if` to ONLY this scanner (any args); it shells out to READ-ONLY git (rev-parse/config/log). The `if` uses permission-rule syntax, where ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} is NOT expanded — so it anchors on a glob of the stable script-path suffix (`*my-commits/scripts/my_commits.py*`) instead of the install-/version-specific absolute path. Tradeoff: a suffix glob is slightly broader than a full-path anchor, but the matched script is read-only and never writes. Both `python3` and the `python` fallback are matched. Consent is granted at plugin install/trust time.
